overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator showing first-person perspective of driving through urban streets in heavy rain. The bus navigates through moderate traffic, makes right turns at intersections, and stops at traffic lights while windshield wipers maintain visibility on the wet roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road with residential buildings

agents.ego_description: driving straight on wet multi-lane road, maintaining following distance from vehicles ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane, brake lights occasionally illuminating

entered.detail: interior dashboard with steering wheel, gauges, and control panels visible in foreground
rain droplets streaking across the windshield with active wiper blades
wet asphalt road with multiple lanes marked by white lines
tall street lamps lining the left side of the road
multi-story apartment blocks with balconies visible through the rain
line of green trees along the right side of the road
large highway sign suspended over the road indicating directions

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from a bus driver's seat navigating a multi-lane urban road during heavy rain. The windshield wipers maintain visibility as the bus follows a white sedan through wet conditions, with residential buildings on the left and trees on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with concrete noise barriers

events.description: bus begins right turn maneuver at intersection

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection, navigating around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white car passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running parallel to the road on the left side
metal safety barrier along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The bus executes a right turn at an intersection, transitioning from the residential area to a road section lined with concrete noise barriers on the left and metal guardrails on the right. The rain continues to fall heavily as the bus completes the turn and accelerates.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial with sound walls and railway tracks

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the road section with concrete barriers on the left, passing other vehicles

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with wires running alongside the road
traffic signs including speed limit indicators mounted on poles

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a straight section of road flanked by concrete noise barriers on the left and trees behind guardrails on the right. Utility poles line the left side while road signs appear periodically on the right as the bus maintains steady speed through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with traffic signals and commercial buildings

events.description: bus stops at red traffic light behind other vehicles
bus begins right turn after traffic light changes

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light waiting for signal change, then executing right turn

notable_agents.action: red sedan stopped ahead at the traffic light, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road surface
red and white gas station canopy visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a major intersection and stops at a red traffic light behind a red sedan. After waiting, the bus executes a right turn, leaving the concrete barrier section behind and entering an area with commercial buildings and a gas station visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban road with dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: driving along curved road section surrounded by dense trees, maintaining speed through the rain

entered.detail: thick line of mature trees forming a dense green wall along the right side
metal chain link fence running parallel to the road on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the bus driving along a road bordered by dense forest trees on the right and a chain link fence. The heavy rain continues to fall as the bus navigates a gentle curve, with the urban commercial area now behind and a more vegetated environment surrounding the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle moves from a residential urban street into a more industrial, enclosed roadway during heavy rain. It begins by following a white sedan along a multi-lane road, with windshield wipers clearing the glass to reveal residential buildings and trees. As the bus executes a right turn at an intersection, the environment shifts from the open neighborhood to a corridor defined by concrete noise barriers and metal guardrails. The scene then expands into a straight stretch of road where utility poles line the left and periodic road signs appear on the right. Finally, the bus maintains a steady speed through the persistent downpour, flanked by the grey concrete walls and a line of trees behind the guardrails.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a bus moves from a congested urban intersection into a secluded, rain-swept forested corridor. It begins with the bus coming to a halt at a red traffic light behind a red sedan, waiting before executing a right turn that leaves a concrete barrier behind. As the vehicle proceeds, the scene opens up to reveal commercial buildings and a gas station on the right side of the road. The environment then shifts away from the urban center, transitioning into a more vegetated landscape where the road is bordered by a chain link fence and dense forest trees. Finally, the bus navigates a gentle curve through the heavy rain, leaving the commercial district entirely behind in favor of the surrounding greenery.
